title: ostrya italica subsp. carpinifolia
intro: Ostrya italica subsp. carpinifolia, also known as the Italian hop hornbeam, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the family Betulaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of Ostrya italica subsp. carpinifolia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
